name: Personalized Gifts | TowneWomanCreations
snippet: After selling handcrafted personalized gifts for a few years, we developed a niche for creating classic and unique products for small businesses. Then the concept of a virtual gift shop emerged, aiming to do nothing less than change the world of gifting through thought, personalization, and heart.
